mission.title: ollama: Add Tokenize and Detokenize Endpoints to Ollama Server
mission.description: Add Tokenize and Detokenize Endpoints to Ollama Server. Requested by 108+ users.

steps.title: Check current Ollama setup
steps.description:
Verify your Ollama version:
```bash
ollama version
```
This feature requires Ollama with tokenize/detokenize support.

steps.title: Review the tokenize and detokenize API
steps.description:
Ollama added tokenize and detokenize endpoints to the server API:
- **Tokenize**: Convert text into token IDs used by the model
- **Detokenize**: Convert token IDs back into text

This is useful for understanding token counts, prompt engineering, and working with token-level operations.

steps.title: Use the tokenize and detokenize endpoints
steps.description:
Test the tokenize endpoint:
```bash
curl -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/tokenize \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model": "llama3", "text": "Hello, world!"}'
```

Test the detokenize endpoint:
```bash
curl -X POST http://localhost:11434/api/detokenize \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model": "llama3", "tokens": [9906, 11, 1917, 0]}'
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Confirm both endpoints return correct results:
1. Tokenize a known string and verify you get token IDs back
2. Detokenize the returned token IDs and verify you get the original text
```bash
ollama list
```
Ensure the model you are testing with is available locally.

resolution.summary: Added tokenize and detokenize API endpoints to the Ollama server, allowing users to convert between text and token IDs for any loaded model.

prerequisites.description: A working ollama installation or development environment.
